"'''Death Is Remotely Possible'''" is an adventure in ''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''. It is set in [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]].

==Plot summary==
Continuing on their search for [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]], the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' head for [[Gandle Ott]] after intercepting NewsNet reports that place Sarne there. Arriving on the planet, they find it a state of confusion as Sarne has left with nearly all [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military personnel and assets. [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Kaiya Adrimetrum]], acting as a representative of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], engages in diplomatic talks with the local leaders. However, Sarne has left a surprise for the ''FarStar'' - a reprogrammed [[BRT supercomputer/Legends|BRT supercomputer]] that is intent on stopping them from following the Moff.

After several days of negotiation and dodging attempts on their lives, the crew learn that Sarne is heading to [[Shintel]]. Discovering that the BRT is behind the attacks on them, the crew of the ''FarStar'' manage to restore the computer - but not before it unleashes an [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] to target them. After a battle with the droid in the [[Theatre Danske]], the ''FarStar'' departs for Shintel to continue their search.
